sources.label: IRS 2026 federal tax brackets
sources.use: Progressive federal income tax validation for 2026 household income.

sources.label: IRS Social Security and Medicare withholding
sources.use: Payroll tax validation separate from federal income tax.

sources.label: SSA actuarial life table
sources.use: Projection horizon and longevity sanity checks.

sources.label: Treasury daily yield curve
sources.use: Risk-free nominal rate anchor for investment assumptions.

sources.label: Census ACS API
sources.use: Regional income, housing, and population baseline validation.

sources.label: Federal Reserve Survey of Consumer Finances
sources.use: Net-worth distribution validation by age/income bands.

checks.label: Nominal compounding
checks.note: Core income, spending, and investment formulas use the standard compound-growth shape.

checks.label: Purchasing-power deflator
checks.note: Matches the app dollar-basis conversion and BLS CPI deflator use case.

checks.label: Real return
checks.note: Formula is mathematically correct; assumption value still needs investment benchmark validation.

checks.label: Inflation benchmark
checks.formula: recent CPI-U annual average = average yearly percent changes in annual CPI index
checks.note: Checks the public benchmark file against normalized BLS CPI-U cache.

checks.label: Federal and payroll tax
checks.formula: tax = IRS progressive federal income tax after standard deduction + employee FICA
checks.note: The current app uses effective tax rates. Replace with bracket/payroll model when validation phase accepts behavior changes.

checks.label: SSA longevity horizon
checks.formula: projection_end_age >= age 65 + max(male/female life expectancy at 65) + 5-year buffer
checks.note: Baseline horizon should stay conservative until user-specific longevity settings exist.

checks.label: Risk-free anchor
checks.formula: equity_return_assumption should be reviewed against current 10-year Treasury yield
checks.note: Not an equity forecast. It verifies that the app shows a risk premium over the current risk-free anchor.

checks.label: Housing appreciation source
checks.formula: home_value_growth should use FHFA HPI once geography is selected
checks.note: App currently holds home appreciation mostly as a planning assumption; geography-specific HPI is the next replacement.

checks.label: Projection sanity
checks.formula: ending_net_worth should remain finite and final value should exceed current value in the baseline case
checks.note: This is a regression guard, not a proof of forecast accuracy.

findings.finding: The current app uses effective tax rates. Replace with bracket/payroll model when validation phase accepts behavior changes.
